product.name: Stratford Park Grommet Sheer Curtain Panel Pair, Header Size 2", Sheer, White, Set of 2, Size 37 x 95
product.description: These light and airy window panels are tailored with grommets at the top for a fresh transitional look and easy opening and closing. The fabric is 100 percent polyester and features clipped "eyelash" surface detail. Two-inch grommets slide easily onto your 1-1.75-inch window rod. The mid-tone hues highlight modern and tasteful styling, worthy of any decor
features: Semi sheer window panels come in a pair of two 37- x 84-inch each, to refresh your window decor in minutes.
Machine Wash Cold Only Non-Chlorine Bleach When Needed Tumble Dry Low Warm Iron If Necessary
